texto: Sometime they don't let you know that they know that they don't know everything, but the core of the medical approach is that you try to identify pathologies, which are subsystems within the human body or the larger system that are having undesirable consequences.
explicacao: Citação de Guy Burgess sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Sometime they don't let you know that they know that they don't know everything, but the core of …” articula tempo, body, know em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como know e you.
